/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/examples-dlib.dir/linalg/dlib.cpp.o -o examples-dlib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libhdf5.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libdl.a -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so ../thirdparty/dlib/v19.24-build/libdlib.a ../thirdparty/libdeflate/liblibh5cpp-libdeflate-static.a
